literal_meaning: bhikkhus, there are these four yokes
preferred_translation: bhikkhus, there are these four yokes
definition: A family-heading formula for the four yokes.
notes: Use this phrase record when the heading appears as a whole. It should inherit the yoga headword policy and keep the yoke image stable across the family.

example_phrases.translation: bhikkhus, there are these four yokes
example_phrases.notes: Standard heading for the yoke family.
